text.message: I know I’m biased but we can’t give him bricks and let him get that port
Its the same if you get that brick too lol
Diff is my spots aren’t as good as yours
Yea but rolls aren’t good for me
Then why did you put your settlements there?
Didn’t have much to work with
Dang u got that brick from orange
Ok we are done battling now
If we don’t block your 8 you’re gonna get cities really fast
And then black with the 2:1 wood port brainwashing others to keep solo block on me
